_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: Wild-type AB strain zebrafish were maintained at 28.5°C with a 14 h light/10 h dark cycle
details: Used as wild-type zebrafish strain for generating transgenic lines and breeding experiments
